title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・ツンツン女王

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet takes the victory and becomes the
queen. She commands Vodka to be her maid for
the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka objects, embarrassed, prompting Daiwa
Scarlet to share her honest request.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She asks Vodka to stay her rival forever,
staggering Vodka with the sudden sincerity.
